# Irys University

Irys University is a public research and education library from Irys on legal AI, matter memory, auditability, legal work product, and AI-native legal workflows.

## Site

- Home: https://iqidis-ai.github.io/irys-university-public/
- Website: https://www.irys.ai/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/irys-legal-ai

## Articles

- Why Prompt-As-Memory Fails In Legal AI: https://iqidis-ai.github.io/irys-university-public/articles/why-prompt-as-memory-fails.html
  - Focus: legal AI memory, matter context, prompt summaries, contract review, redlines, source-backed work product.
- Auditability Is The Product In Legal AI: https://iqidis-ai.github.io/irys-university-public/articles/auditability-is-the-product.html
  - Focus: legal AI auditability, traceable research memos, authority limitations, reviewable support records, matter-level work product.
- Prompt Instructions Are Not Control In Legal AI: https://iqidis-ai.github.io/irys-university-public/articles/prompt-instructions-are-not-control.html
  - Focus: prompt instructions, matter-level controls, source links, caveats, blockers, and legal review state.
- The Exception Leak In Legal AI: https://iqidis-ai.github.io/irys-university-public/articles/legal-ai-exception-leak.html
  - Focus: legal AI failure modes, caveats, contract carve-outs, matter memory, and source-backed blockers.
- A Citation Is Not An Audit Trail: https://iqidis-ai.github.io/irys-university-public/articles/citations-are-not-audit-trails.html
  - Focus: citations, audit trails, source support, confidence, review status, and repairable legal AI workflows.
- Matter Memory Must Preserve Contradictions: https://iqidis-ai.github.io/irys-university-public/articles/matter-memory-preserve-contradictions.html
  - Focus: matter memory, contradictions, caveats, unresolved issues, and legal AI state.
- Rerunning Is Not Repair In Legal AI: https://iqidis-ai.github.io/irys-university-public/articles/rerunning-is-not-repair.html
  - Focus: legal AI repair, localized workflow fixes, auditability, and reusable reviewed state.
- What AlphaEvolve Teaches Legal AI About Evaluated Work: https://iqidis-ai.github.io/irys-university-public/articles/what-alphaevolve-teaches-legal-ai.html
  - Focus: AlphaEvolve, evaluated search, legal AI matter memory, citation verification, reviewable state, and Irys as a legal work platform.

## Boundary

This public site contains only published Irys University articles and article images. Production scripts, prompts, source documents, render assets, and internal review materials are not part of the public corpus.
